title: Stanford University
html:
Stanford

Stub. The aspirational-elite-college pole in late-2019 Yahir's college search — "look into Stanford pre-collegiate bs" (2019 09 23 write scripture for brenda) and the harder "You're only chance of getting into Stanford is to start a business" (2019 09 26 youre only chance of getting into stanford is to start a bus). The blank-body title-only note is the more telling artifact — Yahir at 17 already diagnosing the credentialism gap and treating start a business as the only legible escape route. He'd land at OSU instead, on a Ford ride.

Source summaries

  • 2019 09 23 write scripture for brenda
  • 2019 09 26 youre only chance of getting into stanford is to start a bus
